title: Major Washi Love
excerpt: As you probably already know, I have a (slight) major obsession with washi tape. The craze has been around for a few years and still seems to be going strong. The collection has grown significantly since this video was made…
body:
As you probably already know, I have a (slight) major obsession with washi tape. The craze has been around for a few years and still seems to be going strong. The collection has grown significantly since this video was made last year. It's a little out of hand, but I like it. And the fact that I think I have finally found the perfect way to store the ones that get most used on my desk is another plus. Of course there are still stragglers on my (messy) productive desk.

All Ready Memories sent me this handmade in the USA (Bonus!) wooden washi tape holder. I transferred some of my favorite tapes of the moment to it.

The design is great, with edges that are just sharp enough to tear the washi tape.

I decorated it with the only phrase that seemed appropriate. It really is the most perfect washi tape dispenser around.

Supplies: All Ready Memories Washi Tape Holder | Washi tapes collected over time from Two Peas In A Bucket and Wishy Washy and Studio Calico | camera washi tape by Teresa Collins | cork arrow sticker | Kelly Purkey alphabet stickers I also love the Project Life card holders from All Ready Memories and will be showing you what I did with those on Monday. But honestly, I think I will need to add more of these washi tape holders to my collection ASAP. They're great for taking to events - as you can see it in action at Pink's daughter's 2nd birthday party over the weekend.
